news.title: PNR Cuts Q226 & FY26 Outlook on Pool Weakness, Shares Dip 15%
news.summary: Pentair cuts its 2026 outlook after deeper Pool channel destocking and weak demand hurt Q2, while management targets a return to normalized performance in 2027.

news.title: Pentair brings back CFO as interim finance chief
news.summary: Pentair’s Bob Fishman is returning as interim CFO five months after he resigned from the top finance seat in March.

news.title: Pentair (PNR) Is Down 12.2% After Cutting 2026 Outlook And Announcing CFO Exit – What’s Changed
news.summary: Pentair plc recently cut its second-quarter 2026 and full-year 2026 guidance, now expecting Q2 sales of about US$930 million and GAAP diluted EPS of roughly US$0.80, mainly due to pool channel inventory destocking, weaker pool demand, and pressure from higher interest rates and inflation. news.title: Pentair Stock Tanked on an Alarming Update. It Took These Stocks With It.
news.summary: Shares of water technology company  Pentair  plummeted Wednesday after the company slashed full-year guidance, reported lower-than-expected earnings, and said its chief financial officer resigned.  Wednesday morning, Pentair said it expects 2026 full-year sales to drop 4% to 7%—a sharp reversal from its previous guidance of 2% to 4% sales growth. news.summary: Investing.com -- U.S. stock index futures edged higher on Wednesday after softer inflation data and a strong start to the corporate earnings season boosted investor sentiment, with markets weighing whether resilient corporate profits can continue to support Wall Street’s record rally despite lingering geopolitical risks.

news.title: Pentair shares plummet after guidance cut, surprise CFO exit
news.summary: Investing.com -- Pentair shares have plunged on Wednesday, down around 15.9% at 13:27 ET, following a negative preannouncement after the close on Tuesday that cut full-year guidance and disclosed the departure of its Chief Financial Officer.
